findings.description: Release jp surface reads 「消去法を戦略的の1つ」but the image shows 「消去法も戦略の1つ」. Two errors: (1) 「を」should be 「も」; (2) 「戦略的」should be 「戦略」. The release surface is grammatically incorrect and does not match the image text.

reviewer_notes: 4 of 5 entities are accurate. One med-severity jp_surface_wrong on p026::3: the bullet heading uses 「戦略的の1つ」instead of the correct image text 「戦略の1つ」and 「を」instead of 「も」. The zh/en translations for this entity partially compensate (zh 「排除法是策略之一」is semantically correct) but the jp surface itself does not match the source. All other sections pass.
